meta.summary: Ultrafast all-in-one FASTQ preprocessing and quality control with filtering, trimming, adapter detection, UMI, deduplication, and HTML/JSON reports.
meta.description: Ultrafast all-in-one FASTQ preprocessing and quality control with filtering, trimming, adapter detection, UMI, deduplication, and HTML/JSON reports.

test: fastp --version | grep -Fx 'fastp 1.3.3' >/dev/null
fastp --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'usage:' >/dev/null
parallel.py -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'A python script to use fastp' >/dev/null
ldd $(command -v fastp) | grep -F 'libisal' >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-fastp-smoke && cd /tmp/taf-fastp-smoke && printf '@r1
ACGTACGTACGTACGTACGT
+
FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
@r2
ACGTACGTNNNNACGTACGT
+
FFFFFFFF!!!!FFFFFFFF
' > reads.fq && fastp -i reads.fq -o clean.fq -h report.html -j report.json -w 1 >/tmp/taf-fastp-se.log 2>&1 && test -s clean.fq && test -s report.html && test -s report.json && grep -F '"fastp_version": "' report.json >/dev/null && grep -F '@r1' clean.fq >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-fastp-stdin && cd /tmp/taf-fastp-stdin && printf '@r1
ACGTACGTACGTACGTACGT
+
FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
@r2
ACGTACGTNNNNACGTACGT
+
FFFFFFFF!!!!FFFFFFFF
' > reads.fq && fastp --stdin --stdout -w 1 < reads.fq > stdout.fq 2>/tmp/taf-fastp-stdin.log && grep -F '@r1' stdout.fq >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-fastp-pe && cd /tmp/taf-fastp-pe && printf '@p1/1
ACGTACGTACGTACGTACGT
+
FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
' > r1.fq && printf '@p1/2
TGCATGCATGCATGCATGCA
+
FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
' > r2.fq && fastp -i r1.fq -I r2.fq -o out1.fq.gz -O out2.fq.gz -h pe.html -j pe.json -w 1 >/tmp/taf-fastp-pe.log 2>&1 && test -s out1.fq.gz && test -s out2.fq.gz && test -s pe.html && test -s pe.json

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-fastp-parallel && cd /tmp/taf-fastp-parallel && printf '@p1/1
ACGTACGTACGTACGTACGT
+
FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
' > r1.fq && printf '@p1/2
TGCATGCATGCATGCATGCA
+
FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
' > r2.fq && mkdir -p batch-in batch-out batch-report && cp r1.fq batch-in/sample_R1.fq && cp r2.fq batch-in/sample_R2.fq && parallel.py -i batch-in -o batch-out -r batch-report -p 1 -a '-w 1' >/tmp/taf-fastp-parallel.log && test -s batch-out/sample_R1.clean.fastq.gz && test -s batch-out/sample_R2.clean.fastq.gz && test -s batch-report/sample_pe.fq.html && test -s batch-report/sample_pe.fq.json && test -s batch-report/overall.html
